issues.title: External Dependency §07 Missing
issues.why: The module is a 'strict additive overlay' on §07, but the §07 primitive tokens (e.g., --background, --card) are not provided in this context, preventing 100% confidence in variable resolution.
issues.fix: Provide a snippet of the core §07 token registry in the Cross-References or as a mock fixture.

issues.title: Sidebar State Concurrency
issues.why: The spec mentions a 'collapsed' state for the sidebar at < md breakpoints but does not define the transition logic or how to handle the state if toggled manually (concurrency of window resize vs user click).
issues.fix: Add a requirement that sidebar state must be derived from a unified 'isCollapsed' hook sensitive to both breakpoint and manual toggle.

issues.title: Missing linter-scripts
issues.why: The verification section and CI workflow rely on specific scripts (e.g., detect-changed-modules.sh) that are referenced but not defined.
issues.fix: Add a brief comment describing the expected behavior/exit codes of the referenced linter-scripts.
